messages.content:
请创建一个完整的 HTML5 游戏。游戏描述：我方自动射击，敌方可以发射子弹。
                    
重要技术要求：
1. 单个 HTML 文件
2. 使用 Canvas API
3. Canvas 尺寸必须为 360x640 像素（9:16 竖屏比例）
4. 在 JavaScript 中设置：canvas.width = 360; canvas.height = 640;
5. 在 CSS 中设置：canvas { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 0 auto; }
6. 包含完整游戏循环
7. 有得分系统
8. 确保有趣可玩

只返回 HTML 代码，不要其他说明。

modifications.prompt:
请创建一个完整的 HTML5 游戏。游戏描述：我方自动射击，敌方可以发射子弹。
                    
重要技术要求：
1. 单个 HTML 文件
2. 使用 Canvas API
3. Canvas 尺寸必须为 360x640 像素（9:16 竖屏比例）
4. 在 JavaScript 中设置：canvas.width = 360; canvas.height = 640;
5. 在 CSS 中设置：canvas { max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: block; margin: 0 auto; }
6. 包含完整游戏循环
7. 有得分系统
8. 确保有趣可玩

只返回 HTML 代码，不要其他说明。
modifications.code:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Auto Shooter Game</title>
    <style>
        body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            display: flex;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            min-height: 100vh;
            background-color: #0f0f23;
            font-family: 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif;
        }
        canvas {
            max-width: 100%;
            height: auto;
            display: block;
            margin: 0 auto;
            border-radius: 12px;
            box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.4);
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>
    <canvas id="gameCanvas"></canvas>
    <script>
        const canvas = document.getElementById('gameCanvas');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        canvas.width = 360;
        canvas.height = 640;

        // Game state
        let gameState = 'menu';
        let score = 0;
        let highScore = localStorage.getItem('highScore') || 0;
        let lastTime = 0;
        let deltaTime = 0;

        // Player
        const player = {
            x: canvas.width / 2 - 20,
            y: canvas.height - 60,
            width: 40,
            height: 40,
            speed: 300,
            color: '#4fd1c5',
            shootTimer: 0,
            shootInterval: 0.5 // seconds
        };

        // Bullets
        let playerBullets = [];
        let enemyBullets = [];
        const bulletSpeed = 400;
        const bulletRadius = 4;

        // Enemies
        let enemies = [];
        const enemyWidth = 30;
        const enemyHeight = 30;
        const enemySpeed = 150;
        let enemySpawnTimer = 0;
        let enemySpawnInterval = 2; // seconds

        // Input handling
        const keys = {};
        document.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
            keys[e.key] = true;
            handleInput(e.key, true);
        });
        document.addEventListener('keyup', (e) => {
            keys[e.key] = false;
            handleInput(e.key, false);
        });

        function handleInput(key, pressed) {
            if (gameState === 'menu' && pressed && key === 'Enter') {
                startGame();
            } else if (gameState === 'playing' && pressed && (key === 'p' || key === 'P' || key === 'Escape')) {
                gameState = 'paused';
            } else if (gameState === 'paused' && pressed && (key === 'p' || key === 'P' || key === 'Escape')) {
                gameState = 'playing';
            } else if (gameState === 'gameover' && pressed && key === 'Enter') {
                startGame();
            }
        }

        function startGame() {
            gameState = 'playing';
            score = 0;
            player.x = canvas.width / 2 - player.width / 2;
            player.y = canvas.height - player.height - 20;
            playerBullets = [];
            enemyBullets = [];
            enemies = [];
            enemySpawnTimer = 0;
            player.shootTimer = 0;
        }

        function spawnEnemy() {
            const x = Math.random() * (canvas.width - enemyWidth);
            enemies.push({
                x: x,
                y: -enemyHeight,
                width: enemyWidth,
                height: enemyHeight,
                speed: enemySpeed + Math.random() * 50,
                shootTimer: 0,
                shootInterval: 1 + Math.random() * 2 // seconds
            });
        }

        function update(deltaTime) {
            if (gameState !== 'playing') return;

            // Player movement
            if (keys['ArrowLeft'] || keys['a'] || keys['A']) {
                player.x -= player.speed * deltaTime;
            }
            if (keys['ArrowRight'] || keys['d'] || keys['D']) {
                player.x += player.speed * deltaTime;
            }
            // Keep player in bounds
            player.x = Math.max(0, Math.min(canvas.width - player.width, player.x));

            // Player auto-shoot
            player.shootTimer += deltaTime;
            if (player.shootTimer >= player.shootInterval) {
                player.shootTimer = 0;
                playerBullets.push({
                    x: player.x + player.width / 2 - bulletRadius,
                    y: player.y,
                    radius: bulletRadius,
                    speed: bulletSpeed,
                    color: '#4fd1c5'
                });
            }

            // Update player bullets
            for (let i = playerBullets.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                const bullet = playerBullets[i];
                bullet.y -= bullet.speed * deltaTime;
                if (bullet.y < 0) {
                    playerBullets.splice(i, 1);
                }
            }

            // Spawn enemies
            enemySpawnTimer += deltaTime;
            if (enemySpawnTimer >= enemySpawnInterval) {
                enemySpawnTimer = 0;
                spawnEnemy();
            }

            // Update enemies
            for (let i = enemies.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                const enemy = enemies[i];
                enemy.y += enemy.speed * deltaTime;

                // Enemy shoot
                enemy.shootTimer += deltaTime;
                if (enemy.shootTimer >= enemy.shootInterval) {
                    enemy.shootTimer = 0;
                    enemyBullets.push({
                        x: enemy.x + enemy.width / 2 - bulletRadius,
                        y: enemy.y + enemy.height,
                        radius: bulletRadius,
                        speed: bulletSpeed * 0.8,
                        color: '#ff6b6b'
                    });
                }

                // Remove enemy if off screen
                if (enemy.y > canvas.height) {
                    enemies.splice(i, 1);
                }
            }

            // Update enemy bullets
            for (let i = enemyBullets.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                const bullet = enemyBullets[i];
                bullet.y += bullet.speed * deltaTime;
                if (bullet.y > canvas.height) {
                    enemyBullets.splice(i, 1);
                }
            }

            // Collision detection: player bullets vs enemies
            for (let i = playerBullets.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                const bullet = playerBullets[i];
                for (let j = enemies.length - 1; j >= 0; j--) {
                    const enemy = enemies[j];
                    if (bullet.x < enemy.x + enemy.width &&
                        bullet.x + bullet.radius * 2 > enemy.x &&
                        bullet.y < enemy.y + enemy.height &&
                        bullet.y + bullet.radius * 2 > enemy.y) {
                        // Hit
                        playerBullets.splice(i, 1);
                        enemies.splice(j, 1);
                        score += 10;
                        break;
                    }
                }
            }

            // Collision detection: enemy bullets vs player
            for (let i = enemyBullets.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                const bullet = enemyBullets[i];
                if (bullet.x < player.x + player.width &&
                    bullet.x + bullet.radius * 2 > player.x &&
                    bullet.y < player.y + player.height &&
                    bullet.y + bullet.radius * 2 > player.y) {
                    // Player hit
                    enemyBullets.splice(i, 1);
                    gameOver();
                    break;
                }
            }

            // Collision detection: enemies vs player
            for (let i = enemies.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                const enemy = enemies[i];
                if (enemy.x < player.x + player.width &&
                    enemy.x + enemy.width > player.x &&
                    enemy.y < player.y + player.height &&
                    enemy.y + enemy.height > player.y) {
                    // Collision
                    gameOver();
                    break;
                }
            }
        }

        function gameOver() {
            gameState = 'gameover';
            if (score > highScore) {
                highScore = score;
                localStorage.setItem('highScore', highScore);
            }
        }

        function render() {
            // Clear canvas
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            // Draw background gradient
            const gradient = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, canvas.height);
            gradient.addColorStop(0, '#1a1a2e');
            gradient.addColorStop(1, '#16213e');
            ctx.fillStyle = gradient;
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            // Draw based on game state
            if (gameState === 'menu') {
                drawMenu();
            } else if (gameState === 'playing' || gameState === 'paused') {
                drawGame();
                if (gameState === 'paused') {
                    drawPauseScreen();
                }
            } else if (gameState === 'gameover') {
                drawGameOver();
            }

            // Draw score
            drawScore();
        }

        function drawMenu() {
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.font = '30px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('Auto Shooter', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 - 50);
            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText('Press ENTER to Start', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 20);
            ctx.font = '16px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText('Use Arrow Keys or A/D to Move', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 60);
            ctx.fillText('Press P to Pause', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 90);
        }

        function drawGame() {
            // Draw player
            ctx.fillStyle = player.color;
            ctx.fillRect(player.x, player.y, player.width, player.height);
            // Draw player as a triangle for style
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(player.x + player.width / 2, player.y);
            ctx.lineTo(player.x, player.y + player.height);
            ctx.lineTo(player.x + player.width, player.y + player.height);
            ctx.closePath();
            ctx.fill();

            // Draw player bullets
            playerBullets.forEach(bullet => {
                ctx.fillStyle = bullet.color;
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(bullet.x + bullet.radius, bullet.y + bullet.radius, bullet.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fill();
            });

            // Draw enemies
            enemies.forEach(enemy => {
                ctx.fillStyle = '#ff6b6b';
                ctx.fillRect(enemy.x, enemy.y, enemy.width, enemy.height);
                // Draw enemy as a square with border
                ctx.strokeStyle = '#ffffff';
                ctx.lineWidth = 2;
                ctx.strokeRect(enemy.x, enemy.y, enemy.width, enemy.height);
            });

            // Draw enemy bullets
            enemyBullets.forEach(bullet => {
                ctx.fillStyle = bullet.color;
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(bullet.x + bullet.radius, bullet.y + bullet.radius, bullet.radius, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fill();
            });
        }

        function drawPauseScreen() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.font = '30px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('PAUSED', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2);
            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText('Press P to Resume', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 40);
        }

        function drawGameOver() {
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.7)';
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.font = '30px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('GAME OVER', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 - 30);
            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.fillText(`Score: ${score}`, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 10);
            ctx.fillText(`High Score: ${highScore}`, canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 40);
            ctx.fillText('Press ENTER to Restart', canvas.width / 2, canvas.height / 2 + 80);
        }

        function drawScore() {
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.font = '20px PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif';
            ctx.textAlign = 'center';
            ctx.fillText('Score: ', canvas.width / 2 - 30, 30);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#4fd1c5';
            ctx.fillText(score, canvas.width / 2 + 20, 30);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#ffffff';
            ctx.fillText(`High: ${highScore}`, canvas.width / 2, 55);
        }

        function gameLoop(currentTime) {
            deltaTime = (currentTime - lastTime) / 1000;
            lastTime = currentTime;

            update(deltaTime);
            render();

            requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
        }

        // Start the game loop
        requestAnimationFrame(gameLoop);
    </script>
</body>
</html>
